inputs.leaderInput: "Terrifying Conquerors" Category Ki +4 and HP, ATK & DEF +220%
inputs.input-active-effect:
Massively raises ATK temporarily
Causes ultimate damage to enemy
Ki +24, DEF 200%, directs enemy's attack towards the character
All attacks become critical hits for 1 turn
ATK +500% for 1 turn
inputs.input-active-conditions:
Can be activated when there is another "Terrifying Conquerors" Category ally on the team starting from the 5th turn from the character's entry turn
Or when HP is 50% or less
Starting from the 5th turn from the start of battle (once only)

containers.passiveCard:
Activates the Entrance Animation when there is another "Terrifying Conquerors" Category ally on the team upon the character's entry
  • ATK & DEF 300%, guards all attacks and launches an additional Super Attack for 6 turns
  • Extreme Class allies' Ki +2 and ATK 100% for 3 turns
Basic effect(s)
  • Ki +6
  • ATK & DEF 300%
  • Damage reduction rate up 60%
  • Receives an additional Ki +2 per Ki Sphere obtained
  • Launches an additional attack that has a great chance of becoming a Super Attack
For every attack received or evaded
  • DEF 50% (up to 300%)
  • Chance of performing a critical hit & chance of evading enemy's attack 10% (up to 50%)
When there is a Super Class enemy
  • ATK & DEF 200%
  • Foresees enemy's Super Attack
  • Attack effective against all types
  • Launches two additional Super Attacks
When activating the Active Skill or when attacking with 20 or more Ki
  • ATK 200%
  • Chance of performing critical hit 50%
For every attack that the character is targeted by when HP is above 50%
  • DEF 60%
After receiving an attack as the 2nd or 3rd attacker in a turn
  • DEF 100% once for 2 turns
  • Launches an addtional Attack that has a great chance of becoming a Super Attack for 2 turns
  • "Terrifying Conquerors" Category allies' DEF 100% and damage reduction rate 5% for 2 turns
When the character is KO'd
  • ATK 300%
  • Guards all attacks
  • Revives with 50% HP
When receiving a Ki Blast Super Attack
  • Nullifies it, ATK 400% temporarily and counters with tremendous power when facing an super class enemy
  • Great chance of nullifying it, ATK 300% temporarily and countering with tremendous power
